rationale: The second tahwil arrives — the room widens into a full-bleed moonlight on still water, a sustained warm horizon blooming on the muhayyar impulse, and a single testimonial phrase: "what the room held."

input.group_label: muhayyar arrival — moonlight bloom and held breath

elements.query: moonlight on still water at night, long reflection

elements.semantic_label: sustained warm horizon band at muhayyar
